channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: One year under Paul Atkins, SEC's crypto stance shows break with past
item.description: While the regulator under Atkins has dropped several cases against crypto companies, the SEC still awaits passage of a market structure bill to clarify its authority over crypto.

item.title: Price predictions 4/20: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin bulls retain control over the market, but charts show $80,000 is likely to remain a stiff overhead resistance. Will altcoins rally as BTC price consolidates?

item.title: Palantir Faces Backlash Over AI-Driven Military Doctrine
item.description: A weekend post summarizing ideas from CEO Alex Karp’s 2025 book reignites debate over Silicon Valley’s role in warfare and national defense.

item.title: Prediction Markets Expect Prolonged Strait of Hormuz Disruption—And Oil Traders Are Betting Big
item.description: Prediction markets suggest Strait of Hormuz traffic will not return to normal any time soon, and oil traders expect higher prices.

item.title: Nearly Half of New Streaming Music Is AI-Generated, Says Deezer—But Nobody’s Listening
item.description: French streaming service Deezer says AI-generated music now accounts for nearly half of new uploads—but actual listening remains minimal.

item.title: Tether takes 8.2% stake in Bitcoin mining finance platform Antalpha
item.description: The purchase comes as the stablecoin issuer expands its investments across crypto infrastructure and financial services, including in Kaio, also announced today.

item.title: RaveDAO Token Crashes, Sheds $6.6 Billion in Value as Exchanges Probe Alleged Manipulation
item.description: RaveDAO's token cratered this weekend after blockchain sleuth ZachXBT called on exchanges to investigate trading tied to its surging token.

item.title: NSA Is Using Anthropic's Powerful Claude Mythos AI as CEO Meets With White House: Report
item.description: The NSA is reportedly running Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview on classified networks, even as the Pentagon fights the AI giant in court.

item.title: Brandon is back 💥 📰: bit.ly/4mGr5r2 | @blockchain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5uZWtENkpzdkNNekxvOEtlUjVMZWlySHRqQkRuQlRMN3dQRmhacENESVpxQk5oYmU2d0x0Tk5ncmFIWEFCT0dEMWNHM3hZdTN6VGNYc3g0Zlc3czVtTnBpQmVrR1A?oc=5" target="_blank">Brandon is back 💥 📰: bit.ly/4…

item.title: Ethereum whale opens $90M long bets as ETH price chart eyes $3.2K
item.description: ETH price rising to $2,400 drove whales to open large ETH long bets, as technical indicators suggest a short-term ETH price rally toward $3,000.

item.title: Crypto Funds Add $1.4B as Bitcoin Clears Two-Month Range
item.description: Bitcoin investment products accounted for $1.12 billion in inflows last week, as BTC hit its highest level since early February.

item.title: Five times President Trump made a statement that moved bitcoin, and why it might happen again this week
item.description: Trump’s social media posts and statements to news reporters have triggered 5% to 12% swings in the price of bitcoin, blurring the lines between policy and market manipulation.

item.title: Polymarket in Talks to Raise $400M at $15B Valuation: Report
item.description: The round comes on the heels of NYSE parent company Intercontinental Exchange’s $2 billion investment in the prediction market firm.

item.title: Bitcoin faces near-term pressure as liquidity tightens, Hilbert Group CIO says
item.description: Russell Thompson warned of a sharp tightening in global liquidity that could weigh on risk assets and bitcoin in the near term, before expected U.S. policy action provides relief.

item.title: The Quantum Threat Is Coming for Bitcoin and Crypto—Here's How XRP Ledger Is Preparing
item.description: Quantum computers could threaten Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major networks. Here’s how Ripple plans to secure the XRP Ledger.

item.title: Ocean Network Builds ‘Airbnb for Compute’ Network Using Idle GPUs
item.description: Amid the ongoing GPU shortage, Ocean Network is looking to connect the world’s massive amounts of idle computing power with those who need it.

item.title: Coinbase Now Lets UK Users Borrow Against Their Bitcoin and Ethereum
item.description: After launching crypto-backed loans in the U.S. last year, Coinbase has expanded the Bitcoin, Ethereum offering to U.K. users.

item.title: UK gas-investment firm weighs bitcoin mining, draws criticism
item.description: Reabold Resources' gas field is so large it could theoretically mine 50,000 BTC, local media said. The firm said it will test bitcoin mining before pivoting to data centers.

item.title: Blockchain sleuth accuses RaveDAO of knowing who manipulated the price of its token
item.description: The on-chain sleuth cited "suspicious" exchange-linked activity as RAVE swung from $60 million in market capitalization to $6 billion and back.

item.title: Bitcoin daily gains near 3% as stocks ignore US-Iran war threat, oil drops
item.description: Bitcoin bulls avoided a correction as US markets opened, but analysis warned that Strategy was responsible for much of the latest BTC price strength.

item.title: U.S. crypto adoption is rebounding, bitcoin still dominates, Deutsche Bank says
item.description: Retail participation in the U.S. has bounced back to mid-2025 levels even as most consumers expect lower bitcoin prices ahead, the bank said.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Nears Major Milestone With Largest Ethereum Buy This Year
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies bought $235 million worth of Ethereum last week, bring its total holdings to nearly 5 million ETH.

item.title: Kelp DAO claims LayerZero’s 'default' settings are what actually caused the massive $290 million disaster
item.description: The liquid restaking protocol said the compromised verifier was LayerZero's own infrastructure, and the setup it was faulted for running was LayerZero's onboarding default.

item.title: JUST IN: The odds of Bitcoin dumping to $60,000 crash to 33% as the odds of BTC pumping to $80,000 rise — Polymarket 🚀 Bullish! 🐂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1BYV9NMVJLcHZ3SHI3am9sN2lGYXNkajZQV3BQUnlkcDlxcTdkeXVGendKSWdhb3ExUE9yTzF6LV9ySjNDb1h1TUFSY2lnc0dhQTdIQm5XamItLVl5ZUxEdFNRcFc5V1E?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: The odds of Bitcoi…

item.title: Global stablecoin rulemaking slows, prompting BIS to urge cooperation to avoid fragmentation risks
item.description: To mitigate risks like sudden withdrawals, policymakers are debating safeguards such as limiting interest payments and offering issuers access to central bank backstops.

item.title: Tether backs UAE tokenization firm KAIO in $8M funding round to bring Emirati funds onchain
item.description: The Abu Dhabi-headquartered firm build infrastruture to distribute insitutional funds on blockchain rails, lowering entry barrier for investors.

item.title: Bitmine buys 101,627 ETH in largest purchase since December 2025
item.description: Bitmine bought 101,627 Ether last week, lifting holdings to 4,976,485 ETH, or about 4.12% of supply, as the company moves closer to its 5% target.

item.title: Japan to test government bonds as digital collateral on Canton
item.description: The Japanese Securities Clearing Corporation will test using Japanese government bonds as digital collateral on the Canton network with Mizuho, Nomura and Digital Asset.

item.title: Coinbase, Bybit said to be working together on tokenization, custody and distribution of U.S. stocks
item.description: The talks do not involve any sort of stake acquisition or similar deal to enter the U.S., as was reported elsewhere last month.

item.title: ZachXBT asks MemeCore to explain valuation and token supply
item.description: ZachXBT challenged MemeCore to justify its valuation and explain what he claimed is insider-held supply, as the onchain sleuth widened a probe after the RAVE token’s collapse.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE price plummets 22.9% over weekend
item.description: Bitcoin (BTC) price dropped 2.5% and BNB Token (BNB) fell 2.3% from Friday.

item.title: Strategy Adds $2.5 Billion in Bitcoin as STRC Dividend Traders Drive Largest Buy Since 2024
item.description: Strategy reported its largest purchase in over 16 months, scooping up $2.54 billion in Bitcoin last week alongside STRC’s ex-dividend date.

item.title: RaveDAO's RAVE token risks another 50% crash amid price manipulation claims
item.description: RAVE is trending inside a descending channel pattern, and is about to test the lower trendline target near $0.30 amid price manipulation concerns.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitmine buys 101,627 ether worth over $230 million, its largest weekly haul of 2026
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm is nearing 5 million ETH holdings as it increased its accumulation pace over the past weeks.

item.title: Morning Minute: DeFi's Future in Question After $292M KelpDAO Exploit
item.description: DeFi TVL fell by $13B after the KelpDAO exploit, and now the Vercel CEO is saying "highly sophisticated" actors used AI for its exploit.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy officially surpasses BlackRock's BTC holdings. Strategy: 815,061 BTC BlackRock: 802,823 BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5qZW5aMnY3M1E0MzRicFN3OFFOODF4UUo3WC0tLV83YWpxRDlGaVo3YzVycmdpNlZWSXY0LURKc3h0LWt0ZmcxN3lMOHJEZkJZcDNwdmwyMUtXbXltVFgycUZBNjlYWVE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's S…

item.title: Strategy buys 34,164 Bitcoin for $2.5B, holdings top 800,000 BTC
item.description: Strategy bought 34,164 Bitcoin for $2.54 billion last week, marking its third-largest BTC purchase on record.

item.title: Bitcoin metrics line up bull signals with $78K the BTC price level to beat
item.description: With $75,000 possibly the new floor, Bitcoin is giving hints that a BTC price breakout is about to begin, based on two classic technical indicators.

item.title: Strategy buys 34,164 bitcoin for $2.54 billion, third-largest purchase on record
item.description: Last week's purchases were funded by sales of the company's perpetual preferred stock, STRC, and common stock.

item.title: Coinbase rolls out UK crypto-backed loans as FCA shapes rules
item.description: Coinbase launched USDC loans for UK users backed by BTC, ETH and cbETH, expanding its borrowing product as Britain moves toward a crypto regulatory regime.

item.title: Strategy has acquired 34,164 BTC for ~$2.54 billion at ~$74,395 per bitcoin and has achieved BTC Yield of 9.5% YTD 2026. As of 4/19/2026, we hodl 815,061 $BTC acquired for ~$61.56 billion at ~$75,527 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5NT2FpakNWZG9Qd0taMXhoTG1Dc2t1M2h4WVVvSmFEZGM3NTBpWHdCWlZJRXJfS09nazVpanZSQnlYcVRvNUxyS2I1OVgtM3duclZfREVMQXdzYk0?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 34,164 BTC for ~$2.54…

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire ends, Tesla earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 20.

item.title: LayerZero Pins $292M KelpDAO Bridge Hack on North Korea’s Lazarus Group
item.description: Attackers forged a cross-chain message, came within minutes of a second drain, and wiped their tracks on the way out.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs ow over a $1b in YTD flows (having dug out of the outflow hole and then some). Next thing to watch is the cumulative lifetime net flows (MOST IMP and HARDEST NUMBER). This number peaked at $62.8b, curr $58b so about $5b away from hittin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1LUzBkaEtvbkRPM3ZvVVhGVWxyUGxlTWdTWUN6VEtzdDNGUVJHZkdSdnk5cjE3cEdvT2pSRWNYSFhlSVUyR1pwd0IwZVp0M3ZidXZKM3BFQzExczRGcDJndFdJWlQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETFs ow over a $1b in Y…

item.title: Nearly $1 billion in bitcoin ETF inflows power bull case as Kelp hack fuels DeFi jitters
item.description: What you need to know for April 20, 2026

item.title: Crypto fund inflows hit $1.4B in second-strongest week since January
item.description: Crypto investment products recorded $1.4 billion in inflows last week as Bitcoin almost touched $78,000, with assets under management rising to $154.8 billion.

item.title: ‘Highly Sophisticated,’ AI-Powered Hackers Behind Vercel Breach: CEO
item.description: The security incident compromised some customer credentials of the cloud platform, which is used by many crypto frontends to host their UI.

item.title: Bitcoin drops from recent highs as traders watch CME gap, DeFi hack fallout
item.description: Bitcoin pulled back after Friday’s surge as traders considered a CME futures gap, a DeFi exploit rattled altcoins and macro pressures weighed on sentiment.

item.title: LayerZero says Kelp setup enabled exploit, as Aave loss questions mount
item.description: LayerZero said that Kelp’s DVN setup allowed the $290 million exploit, as investors questioned which protocol would step up to cover the shortfall.

item.title: How Mastercard plans to settle card payments with stablecoins
item.description: Mastercard is testing stablecoin settlement with SoFiUSD to speed up card transaction clearing and help bridge traditional finance and blockchain.

item.title: Coinbase Tests AI Agents Modeled on ‘Legendary’ Former Execs
item.description: The exchange is trialing AI agents that replicate the decision-making styles of co-founder Fred Ehrsam and former CTO Balaji Srinivasan.

item.title: Bitcoin is rallying as flagship conference approaches, data shows the gains rarely last
item.description: After a 50% slide and partial recovery for bitcoin, traders are watching whether the Las Vegas event marks another short-term top for bitcoin.

item.title: BTC price due new highs: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin saw a green weekly close despite renewed US-Iran war momentum, and a trader forecast that BTC price action would beat last week's local highs.

item.title: Here's how bitcoin's $7.9 billion April options expiry impact prices
item.description: With the bitcoin price above max pain and heavy positioning at $75K, traders face a potential squeeze or pullback into "max pain" expiry.

item.title: A $300 million borrowing spike on Aave signals liquidity crunch after KelpDAO exploit
item.description: The aftershocks of the Saturday's KelpDAO hack are spreading through stablecoin markets in ways that were not immediately obvious.

item.title: 🔥 VITALIK: Ethereum is not built to compete with high-frequency trading platforms or be the fastest chain. “It’s meant to be the secure chain, the decentralized chain, the chain you can rely on.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8yVUYwZ25LS0xfcW1xaE5EWWwydXdsNGlhZUwzMXpWWEdoY2VLRTFCZU8wZ1RNblFwVFFmVWl3SGNVc2NkTHBxZ1hmTTVEMTBLOWhMWkxNMmFQUzdGSU5Iam1teEE?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 VITALIK: Ethereum is not bui…

item.title: Crypto-backed loans are now live in the UK. Start borrowing USDC against BTC, ETH and cbETH. Unlocking liquidity without having to sell your crypto. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA3cHVaUUc4eTFSZzlUNjFLX1ZZNTV5SzZPcWw5S3E3QUMzR1RtRFNfUEZwbmFQT2dBWWkzRUtuRDlrRWVMWGlMRkRBeDF1anZBbmZ4ZjhyODZlQlp3dlJlMg?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto-backed loans are now live in …

item.title: BIS warns dollar stablecoins could strain banks and policy
item.description: BIS general manager Pablo Hernández de Cos said US dollar stablecoins may pose risks to financial stability and urges stronger global coordination on regulation.

item.title: Meet the AI running a blockchain CEO's life - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE1OS2JlV1d2Vk9Wd0NBRjQ3VThCM3pJc3htSmxFMzBWTm41cWx6QzI3aG5iWXJadEdWSW1WOWNKY19MX1RHUjl0amJPVjZ1ZVNYQnZHY3VBRkhlZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Meet the AI running a blockchain CEO's life<…
